title: Kramdown Cheat Sheet
description: Essential Kramdown commands and syntax for engineers.

commands.description: Convert Markdown file to HTML using Kramdown.
commands.scenario: Use when you need to convert a Markdown file to HTML format for web use.

commands.description: Convert Markdown to HTML using a specific template.
commands.scenario: Use when you want to apply a custom HTML template during conversion.

commands.description: Convert Markdown file to PDF format.
commands.scenario: Use when you need a PDF version of your Markdown document.

commands.description: Use CodeRay for syntax highlighting in HTML output.
commands.scenario: Use when you need syntax highlighting in your HTML output.

commands.description: Disable automatic ID generation for headers.
commands.scenario: Use when you want to prevent automatic ID generation for headers in HTML.

commands.description: Customize smart quotes in the output.
commands.scenario: Use when you need to customize the style of smart quotes in your HTML output.

commands.description: Enable footnote backlinks in HTML output.
commands.scenario: Use when you want footnotes to have backlinks to their references.
Use when you need to enable CodeRay for syntax highlighting in your HTML output.

commands.description: Use MathJax for rendering math in HTML output.
commands.scenario: Use when you need to render mathematical expressions using MathJax.

commands.description: Generate a table of contents for specified header levels.
commands.scenario: Use when you want to include a table of contents for specific header levels in HTML.

commands.description: Treat warnings as errors during conversion.
commands.scenario: Use when you want to enforce strict conversion by treating warnings as errors.

commands.description: Disable line wrapping in HTML output.
commands.scenario: Use when you need to disable line wrapping in the generated HTML for better readability.
